rationale: Tests if waiting for the first weekly higher-low during a deep correction filters out false bear-market relief rallies.
expected_failure_mode: V-bottom recoveries can leave this family behind entirely due to late entries.
stop_conditions: candidate fails the authority certification gates
drift is not reproducible from point-in-time snapshots
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Misses more than 35% of the initial rebound move on major bottoms.
Ulcer Index exceeds QQQ buy-and-hold over the full era.
